finding_results.notes: Retuned the meal-scene banter so Lale stays account-minded and precise, Riva sounds task-first and physically consequential, Tovin answers in blunt kitchen-and-labor authority, and Iven keeps rerouting pressure into barter and flirtation.

summary: Strengthened speaker separation in the meal banter while preserving the scene's warmth, humor, and continuity into the later suspicion turn.
